name: Milotic
flavor: Milotic has provided inspiration to many artists. It has even been referred to as the most beautiful Pokémon of all.

ability.name: Healing Ripples
ability.effect: Once during your turn, when you play this Pokémon from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may heal 60 damage from 1 of your [W] Pokémon.
